text: Science has a clearer story about Mars dust storms than social media does. These storms can blanket the entire planet, reducing visibility for months. But how do they form? It starts with temperature differences. Warm air rises, creating winds that lift dust high into the atmosphere. But here’s the twist—these storms can actually change the climate on Mars! While scientists study how these storms affect Martian weather, we’re left with more questions than answers. Curious about more Mars mysteries? Smash that follow for more!
